rationale: Educ. Code §13.154 governs canvassing consolidation election results for school districts. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 13.154. CANVASS; RESULT. (a) Each board of trustees shall canvass the returns of the election in its district and shall publish the results separately for each district.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
